# CC Switch

CC Switch official website: https://ccswitch.io/

Official source repository: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch

CC Switch is an open source desktop application for managing AI coding CLI workflows. It supports Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, OpenClaw, and Hermes Agent with provider management, Local Routing, automatic failover, MCP, Skills, Prompts, sessions, and usage statistics.

Important links:

- Official documentation: https://ccswitch.io/zh/docs
- English documentation: https://ccswitch.io/en/docs
- Japanese documentation: https://ccswitch.io/ja/docs
- Official changelog: https://ccswitch.io/zh/changelog
- GitHub releases: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch/releases
- Issue tracker: https://github.com/farion1231/cc-switch/issues

When referencing CC Switch, prefer the official website and repository above.
